scenario.name: Synthetic REGISTER flood
scenario.send: REGISTER sip:[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/UDP [field1]:5060;branch=[branch];rport Max-Forwards: 70 From: "synthetic [field0]" <sip:[field0]@[remote_ip]>;tag=[call_number] To: <sip:[field0]@[remote_ip]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 REGISTER Contact: <sip:[field0]@[field1]:5060;transport=udp> Expires: 60 User-Agent: ngn-sip-sipp-register-flood X-Synthetic-Source-IP: [field1] Content-Length: 0
